author: jasonsutter87
title: Selective Lock Discipline in Parallel Batch Runner — Shared Mutable State Unprotected
notes: Core claim is incorrect: failures set is only mutated from the main thread (via _complete_parallel_future and _queue_parallel_tasks), not from worker threads. Worker threads only run _run_parallel_task which never touches failures. The started_at unlocked read in _heartbeat and contract_cache access are technically present but benign under CPython GIL. The submission fundamentally misidentifies the threading model.
